dataset: NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis Monthly Long-Term Mean Sea Level Pressure
privileged_info_summary: The dataset is the real NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis Monthly Long-Term Mean Sea Level Pressure (slp.mon.ltm.nc), downloaded directly from NOAA. The instructions state the SLP variable is in Pascals, but the NetCDF dataset natively uses millibars. Analysis of the raw data array reveals that the annual zonal mean Sea Level Pressure features a Southern Hemisphere Subtropical High peak at -32.5° (1018.67 mb), a Northern Hemisphere Subtropical High peak at 35.0° (1017.48 mb), and an Equatorial Trough minimum at 2.5° (1010.86 mb).
